examples.title: Basic fork() Example
examples.description: Simple program demonstrating fork() and differentiating parent/child
examples.explanation: Demonstrates basic fork() usage: checks return value to differentiate parent and child, uses getpid()/getppid() for identification, uses wait() to prevent zombie
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is execution time

examples.title: fork() with exec() Example
examples.description: Child process executes a new program using exec()
examples.explanation: Shows fork()-exec() pattern: child replaces its image with 'ls' program using execlp(). Parent waits for completion using wait()

examples.title: Zombie Process Demonstration
examples.description: Program that creates a zombie process
examples.explanation: Demonstrates zombie creation: child exits but parent doesn't wait. During parent sleep, 'ps' shows child as zombie (defunct)

examples.title: Multiple fork() Calls
examples.description: Creates multiple child processes using sequential fork()
examples.explanation: Shows nested fork() calls creating multiple processes. First fork creates child, second fork (in child) creates grandchild, resulting in 3 total processes

examples.title: Pipe Communication after fork()
examples.description: Parent and child communicate through pipe
examples.explanation: Demonstrates inter-process communication: creates pipe before fork, child reads from parent through pipe after fork
